title: Uragoga wildemanii

This family consists of flowering plants that are primarily native to tropical and subtropical regions. Uragoga wildemanii is a type of flowering plant that is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Uragoga wildemanii places it within the genus Uragoga, which comprises plants native to tropical Africa. Further classification includes the family Acanthaceae, and the order Lamiales, which comprises flowering plants with bilaterally symmetrical flowers.
